title: perideridia lemmonii
intro: Perideridia lemmonii, also known as Lemmon's Meadow Biscuitroot, is a type of flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Perideridia lemmonii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
